mapper.select:
select * from `order`
and (order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or user_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or user_phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or car_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and status in ('pending_pay', 'pending_audit')
and status in ('pending_pickup', 'active', 'pending_return')
and status in ('completed', 'cancelled', 'refunded')
and create_time >= #{startDate}
and create_time <= #{endDate}
order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into order_log (order_id, order_no, from_status, to_status, operator, operator_type,remark, create_time) values (#{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{operator}, #{operatorType}, #{remark}, now())
mapper.select:
select count(*) from `order`
and status in ('pending_pay', 'pending_audit')
and status in ('pending_pickup', 'active')
and status in ('completed', 'cancelled', 'refunded')
select * from `order` where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
select count(*) from `order` where user_id = #{userId} and status = #{status}
select status, count(*) as count from `order` where user_id = #{userId} group by status
mapper.insert: insert into `order` ( order_no, user_id, user_name, user_phone, car_id, car_name, car_image,car_seats, car_gear, car_energy, daily_price,pickup_time, return_time, days,pickup_location, return_location,total_price, dynamic_rent, price_adjustments,deposit, payment_method, status,remark, create_time ) values ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{carId}, #{carName}, #{carImage},#{carSeats}, #{carGear}, #{carEnergy}, #{dailyPrice},#{pickupTime}, #{returnTime}, #{days},#{pickupLocation}, #{returnLocation},#{totalPrice}, #{dynamicRent},#{priceAdjustments},#{deposit}, #{paymentMethod}, #{status},#{remark}, now() )
mapper.update: update `order` set status = 'pending_audit', payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, payment_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 'pending_pay'
update `order` set status = 'refunding', cancel_reason = #{reason}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 'pending_pickup'
mapper.select: select * from `order` where status = 'pending_pay' and create_time <= #{expireTime} order by create_time asc
select distinct car_id from `order` where user_id = #{userId} and status in ('completed', 'active', 'pending_pickup')

select c.brand_id from `order` o left join car c on o.car_id = c.id where o.user_id = #{userId} and o.status in ('completed', 'active', 'pending_pickup') group by c.brand_id order by count(*) desc limit 1

select c.energy from `order` o left join car c on o.car_id = c.id where o.user_id = #{userId} and o.status in ('completed', 'active', 'pending_pickup') group by c.energy order by count(*) desc limit 1
select c.seats from `order` o left join car c on o.car_id = c.id where o.user_id = #{userId} and o.status in ('completed', 'active', 'pending_pickup') group by c.seats order by count(*) desc limit 1
